text: {hub_gossip}
Ran a gear check. Everything is technically present. Confidence: borderline.
Ate an expired MRE before deploying. Flavor: existential. Stomach: coping.
Gave themselves a pep talk in the locker-room mirror. Rat Rating momentarily irrelevant.
Checked the stash. Counted the water bottles. There are more water bottles than expected.
Shuttle inbound. Checked gear twice. Still forgot the thing they needed.
Altitude good. Zone visible below. Several concerning smoke plumes. Optimal.
Found {mundane_item}. {hoarder_justification}
Found a {water_item}. Current count: indeterminate. Packing it anyway.
An Anxietick {robot_flavor_anxietick}. Hid behind a crate. It eventually left.
A Tattletale drone {robot_flavor_tattletale}. Relocated at speed.
Roomba Prime {robot_flavor_roomba_prime}. Took significant damage avoiding it. The floor was very clean.
Found a locker and hid in it. A robot is also waiting outside. We're both very patient.
Met another raider. We emoted at each other for several minutes then both ran in opposite directions.
Formed a temporary alliance with another raider. We split up immediately. Classic.
Spotted a crate in the distance. It is definitely full of good things and not a robot.
Backpack is almost full. Found another crate. Reorganising to fit. Just one more.
{extract_success_line}
Extraction beacon active. Counting down. Three robots in pursuit. This is fine.
{death_quip}
